chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1500 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6735/2020 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 15.12.2022 Mr. Abdul Qadir Khanzada, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioners, after arguing the matter at some length and in view of the dictum laid down by the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan the cases of Khushal Khan Khattak University through Vice- Chancellor and others v. Jabran Ali Khan and others (2021 SCMR 977) and Agriculture, Livestock and Cooperative Department Peshawar and others v. Saeed-ul-Hassan and others (2021 SCMR 1376), does not press instant petition; however, states that the petitioners shall submit proper applications for their adjustment in service against existing vacant posts as per their qualification to the concerned officer(s) of the Forest Department, Government of Sindh on the ground that they have been serving for last more than ten years on contingent/work charge basis. In view of above, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application, leaving the petitioners at liberty to approach the concerned officer(s) for redressal of their grievances in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
